title: Mayaka Oosi Lyrics Yuvan Yuvathi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Vijay Prakash, Madhumitha
Lyrics: Kalai Kumar
Song : Mayaka oosi

Mayaka oosi ... unthan paarvai aachu..
Athu thaaki thaaki, moorchai aanene..
Marugi marugi, thinam urugi urugi....
Unnai thaangi thaangi, motcham ponane..
Nee illamal.. Ennaal iruka mudiyaathey..
Enna aachu... aethum ennaku theriyaathey..

Mayaka oosi unthan paarvai aachu....
Athu thaaki thaaki moorchai aanene..

Ulagil ulla azhagai ellam unnil kandene..
Anumin nilayam ondrai unthan kannil kandene..
Ethuvum puriyaamal,
ennai ariyaamal unnil kaathal kondene.. ho hoh

Silayai meetum uliyai polae ennai thotaaye..
Kalagam seiyum viralaal ennai aetho seithaye..
Udayai kalaraamal,
valiyai unaraamal sugamaaga kondraaye.. ho hoh

Unnai kanda maru nodiyae
iruthayam valapuram maariduthey
Un kai theendum oru nodiyil
narambugal ennakullae vedikindrathey..

Mayaka oosi unthan paarvai aachu..
Athu thaaki thaaki, moorchai aanaenae..

Thaniye naanum kaanum naeram bhoomi nirkattum
Priya vidaiyai sonne Pinnae meendum sutratum
Siragai virikaamal,
uyire parakaamal vizhi vinnai thaandattum .ho hoh.

Unthan munnae thoongum thotam thoatru pogattum
Neeyum soodaa pookal ellam kenjik ketkattum
Kadalum neeyaaga,
Puyalum naanaaga unnil maiyam kollattum.. ho hoh ..

Kadhal endra vaarthaiyile, aayiram kavithaigal therigirathey
Imaigal thaaki ithayangale, podi podi podiyena uthirkirathe..

Mayaka oosi ... unthan paarvai aachu..
Athu thaaki thaaki, moorchai aanene..
Marugi marugi, thinam urugi urugi....
Unnai thaangi thaangi, motcham ponane..
Nee illamal.. Ennaal iruka mudiyaathey..
Enna aachu... aethum ennaku theriyaathey..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mayaka Oosi?

The song Mayaka Oosi expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the essence of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the movie Yuvan Yuvathi?

Yuvan Yuvathi revolves around youthful love and relationships, showcasing the challenges and joys faced by the characters.

Who are the singers of Mayaka Oosi?

The song is sung by Madhumitha and Vijay Prakash, both of whom bring a unique charm to the track.

Who composed the music for Yuvan Yuvathi?

The music for Yuvan Yuvathi was composed by Vijay Antony, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was Mayaka Oosi released?

Mayaka Oosi was released on July 24, 2011, and has since become a favorite among fans of romantic music.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mayaka Oosi, the protagonists express their deep affection and longing for each other, encapsulating the essence of youthful love. The song's melodic composition by Vijay Antony, paired with the heartfelt lyrics by Kalai Kumar, creates a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. As the characters navigate their emotions, the song evokes feelings of joy and nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. This duet beautifully showcases the chemistry between the singers, enhancing the overall emotional impact of the track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mayaka Oosi from Yuvan Yuvathi is a captivating duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Madhumitha and Vijay Prakash, this song is a melodic journey that resonates with heartfelt emotions. The unique collaboration of talented artists and Vijay Antony's mesmerizing music makes this track a must-listen for every romantic soul.
stanzaMeanings: The enchanting gaze of yours has captured me. It pulls me in, making me faint. Day by day, I melt away... Without you, I can't survive. What has happened? I don't understand anything...
The enchanting gaze of yours has captured me. It pulls me in, making me faint.
I see all the beauty in the world within you. I see a place of hope in your eyes. Without understanding anything, without knowing me, you have captured my heart.
Like a stone that meets a wave, you have touched me. With a storm causing chaos, you have done something to me. Without losing my brightness, without losing my strength, you have brought me joy.
Seeing you, my heart has changed completely. In just one moment, my heart has become restless.
The enchanting gaze of yours has captured me. It pulls me in, making me faint.
When I see you alone, the earth stands still. I told my beloved to leave, but then I circle back again. Without spreading my wings, without letting my soul fly, my eyes have given me the sky.
In front of you, the garden blooms and spreads. You and the flowers all listen to me. The sea becomes you, the storm becomes me, and you become my center.
In the word love, there are a thousand poems. These feelings rise up, little by little, and they are released.
The enchanting gaze of yours has captured me. It pulls me in, making me faint. Day by day, I melt away... Without you, I can't survive. What has happened? I don't understand anything...
